positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial jungle scene. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and centralized, featuring interconnected geometric foliage, glowing lunar moths, and stylized crystalline flora. Use bold, clean linework reminiscent of Art Nouveau and minimalist tattoo art. The artwork must have high contrast, dramatic backlighting, and a symmetrical focus. Color palette is limited to deep indigo, vibrant teal, burnt gold, and off-white. Vector illustration style, suitable for screen printing on apparel, clean silhouette, graphic design aesthetic.
negative: blurry, grainy, photorealistic, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, poor quality, ugly, noisy, low detail, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, gradient wash
